content:
Hello, 

Currently the auto and speed buttons are to the top and right of the Posse button, which means that players (especially on mobile) often will end up pressing either one while trying to use their posses. As hitting auto accidentally may cause an unwanted action to take place that can jeopardize gameplay, especially if the player does not have the rollback privilege, it would probably be best to move it somewhere with less likelihood of unintentionally hitting it. Accidentally hitting the speed button is just a quality of life issue, as if you change it away from your preferred speed you just waste some time changing it back usually. 

Personally I think it's fine to just place both of them somewhere in the top right corner, but I've seen some suggestions about putting it in the drop down menu as well, where you check settings, achievements, etc.

This event says it ends in 15 days.  I paid for the skin. If I wasn't logging in everyday, would I still be able to get this skin? Or would the event close without me receiving it?

Also, please limit the time to wait. Maybe like 3-7 days after release?
